Index.title: La Croisière Residence | Your exceptional apartment in Benin

about.title: The art of living
about.quote: The intimacy of home, the refinement of a 4-star service.
about.text: La Croisière Residence is a prestigious stopover composed of 14 unique units in the heart of Cotonou. It offers a secure and luxurious setting for business and leisure travelers.

longstay.title: Long Stay Discount
longstay.desc: Enjoy 20% off for any stay longer than 7 nights.

weekend.title: Weekend Getaway
weekend.desc: Complimentary breakfast and late check-out included.

reviews.title: The experience lived by our guests.
reviews.subtitle: Our residents' satisfaction is our greatest pride.

marc.name: Marc Traore
marc.text: An amazing experience. The staff is very attentive and the setting is simply sublime.

sarah.name: Sarah Lawson
sarah.text: Security and comfort at the top. You really feel at home with the services of a palace.

Footer.desc: Hotel excellence in Benin. A unique experience for your business and leisure stays in Cotonou.

ComingSoon.text: We are preparing a digital experience that matches the prestige of our residence. This section will soon be available to offer you the best of La Croisière.
